# AI Agent Handbook
> A free reference for developers learning AI agents

## What this covers
- Tokens, context windows, hallucination, temperature
- Agents, sub-agents, MCP, tools, skills, rules, hooks, commands
- RAG vs AST indexing — how agents find your code
- Full pipeline: what happens when you tell an agent to change a function
- Cost model — why sessions compound
- Project setup for Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Continue.dev
- Frontend and backend engineer playbooks
- Cross-repo workflows

## URL
https://ai-agent-handbook.pages.dev

## Author
Muskan Agarwal — https://github.com/muskan27797
